title: Number of Subarrays With GCD Equal to K
titleCn: 最大公因数等于 K 的子数组数目

testcases.input: nums = [9,3,1,2,6,3], k = 3 Output: 4 Explanation: The subarrays of nums where 3 is the greatest common divisor of all the subarray's elements are: - [9,3,1,2,6,3] - [9,3,1,2,6,3] - [9,3,1,2,6,3] - [9,3,1,2,6,3]
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The subarrays of nums where 3 is the greatest common divisor of all the subarray's elements are: - [9,3,1,2,6,3] - [9,3,1,2,6,3] - [9,3,1,2,6,3] - [9,3,1,2,6,3]

testcases.input: nums = [4], k = 7 Output: 0 Explanation: There are no subarrays of nums where 7 is the greatest common divisor of all the subarray's elements.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There are no subarrays of nums where 7 is the greatest common divisor of all the subarray's elements.
